description: A QA team has an existing freestyle job named 'Smoke-Test-Runner' that runs a quick smoke test suite. Create a new job named 'Regression-Test-Runner' by copying 'Smoke-Test-Runner'. The new job's description must be 'Runs full regression tests against staging environment' and its build command must be: echo "Running regression tests..." && echo "TEST_SUITE=regression" && echo "TARGET_ENV=staging" && sleep 5 && echo "Regression tests passed: 142/142". Ensure the original 'Smoke-Test-Runner' job remains unchanged. Login credentials — Username: admin, Password: Admin123!

metadata.expected_description: Runs full regression tests against staging environment
